articles.title: Harmony announces $1M hackathon aimed at merging traditional finance and DeFi
articles.description: The hackathon will run for roughly six weeks from Aug. 15 to Sept. 30 and include four challenges from three different categories.

articles.title: Ethereum Co-Founder to Sell Firm, Quit Cryptocurrency: Report
articles.description: Anthony Di Iorio founded Ethereum in 2014 alongside Vitalik Buterin, Gavin Wood, Charles Hoskinson, Joseph Lubin, and others.

articles.title: Hacking group Anonymous launches Anon Inu crypto token “to fight Musk and China”
articles.description: The decentralized hacker collective known as Anonymous is set to launch a crypto token called Anon Inu on the Binance Smart Chain (BSC).

articles.title: Binance USD Stablecoin Market Cap Surpasses $10 Billion
articles.description: Second U.S. Dollar Tether (USDT) rival joins 11-digit club: BUSD breaks into top 10

articles.title: Pontem to Use Polkadot to Connect Diem and DeFi
PayPal users can now buy $100,000 worth of Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, and Bitcoin Cash weekly
articles.description: US financial player PayPal has announced that its users can now purchase as much as $100,000 worth of supported cryptocurrencies via its platform starting this week. The post PayPal users can now buy $100,000 worth of Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, and Bitcoin Cash weekly appeared first on CryptoSlate.

articles.title: Judge Denies SEC Motion to Suppress Deposition in Ripple Case
articles.description: US District Court Judge Sarah Netburn denied the SEC's motion in its case against Ripple to suppress the deposition of William Hinman.

articles.title: Dorsey Plans DeFi on Bitcoin, Critics Point to Ethereum
DeFi darling ThorChain (RUNE) suffers multi-million dollar exploit
articles.description: ThorChain, a decentralized finance (DeFi) token swap protocol based on the Cosmos blockchain, lost roughly $4.8 million worth of Ethereum (ETH) from its liquidity pools to a hacker attack today.

articles.title: $5M in Ethereum Lost in THORChain Exploit
articles.description: A recent exploit of the THORChain platform resulted in the loss of $5 million in Ethereum. The incident highlights vulnerabilities in decentralized finance protocols, raising concerns about security measures within the crypto space. Efforts are underway to investigate the breach and mitigate future risks.

articles.title: Thorchain’s RUNE Token Slides 15% Following Multi-Million Dollar Exploit
articles.description: Decentralized finance protocol Thorchain will use its treasury funds to reimburse the Ethereum liquidity providers affected by the recent hack.

articles.title: Court grants Ripple bid to force ex-SEC director to testify in XRP case
articles.description: Ripple scores major discovery win as judge rules ex-SEC official William Hinman must answer ‘central question’ on Ethereum in the globally-watched case about XRP.

articles.title: THORChain Exploited for $5 Million in Latest DeFi Attack
articles.description: Cross-chain decentralized exchange (DEX) THORChain has been added to the lengthening list of exploited protocols as details emerge of a multi-million dollar hack. The post THORChain Exploited for $5 Million in Latest DeFi Attack appeared first on BeInCrypto.

articles.title: Judge allows Ripple to depose SEC official who decided ETH is not a security
articles.description: Bill Hinman could be called to testify on his 2018 comments regarding Ethereum’s security status.
